title: Event loop blocked — /api/reports endpoint freezes server for 3+ seconds
description: The GET /api/reports/sales endpoint causes the entire Node.js event loop to block for 3-5 seconds on each request. During this time, no other requests can be processed, causing timeouts across the service. Investigation shows a synchronous file read operation is being performed on every request to load a large HTML email template.
steps_to_reproduce: Simultaneously send GET /api/health (or any other endpoint)
Observe that the health check hangs until the report request completes
error_log:
No errors, but monitoring shows:
- Event loop lag: 3200ms (threshold: 100ms)
- p99 latency spike across all endpoints during report generation
- Thread pool utilization: 100%
expected_behavior: Report generation should not block other request processing
actual_behavior: Synchronous file I/O blocks the event loop, causing all concurrent requests to queue
recent_changes: Added email report generation feature with templated HTML output
